Headline: Candidates in the 2022 Philippine Senate election
Description: This is a list of candidates in the 2022 Philippine Senate election.

Headline: Hsieh Che-ching
Description: Hsieh Che-ching (Chinese: 謝哲青; born 18 November 1973 in Hualien County, Taiwan)[1] is a Taiwanese cultural/art history expert,[2] broadcaster and travel writer.[3][4]

Headline: Alınteri, Hınıs
Description: Alınteri is a neighbourhood in the municipality and district of Hınıs, Erzurum Province in Turkey.[1][2] Its population is 66 (2022).[3]

Headline: Dagim
Description: Dagim (lit. 'Fog') is a 2010 Filipino horror film directed by Joaquin Pedro Valdes, starring Marc Abaya, Martin del Rosario, Rita Iringan and Samuel Quintana. The film is one of seven finalists in the Cinema One Originals for 2010.[1]

Headline: Lymphotoxin beta
Description: Lymphotoxin-beta (LT-beta) formerly known as tumor necrosis factor C (TNF-C) is a protein that in humans is encoded by the LTB gene.[5][6][7]
